description: The disc-collector's CLI for Blu-ray.com — offline catalog, live deals, and a price-drop watchlist with zero account required.

tools.name: calendar_digital
tools.description: Digital release calendar (streaming/rental window opens). Optional: year.

tools.name: calendar_releases
tools.description: Release calendar page for a given year, optionally filtered by country and format. JS-driven UI; the raw HTML still contains the listing data the page renders. Optional: year, country, format.

params.name: year
params.description: Calendar year (2006-onwards). Defaults to current year when omitted.

tools.name: calendar_theatrical
tools.description: Theatrical release calendar for a given year. Returns Blu-ray.com's listing of films opening in theaters, with titles and release dates parsed from the page HTML (the UI is JS-driven, but the raw HTML still carries the listing data). Optional 'year' selects the calendar year; defaults to the current year when omitted. Optional: year.

tools.name: deals_list
tools.description: Current Blu-ray.com deals, filterable by country and format. Each row carries the underlying release id and the affiliate click URL (the latter is not followed by the CLI). Optional: country (default: USA), format.

params.name: country
params.description: Country code (USA, UK, DE, FR, ...). Defaults to USA.

tools.name: news_get
tools.description: Fetch a single news story by id. Required: id.

tools.name: news_index
tools.description: News index page (latest stories on top). Hand-parser extracts headline + posted-date + body link.

tools.name: releases_get
tools.description: Fetch the canonical release detail page by URL slug and id. The id is stable; slug is documented for redirect-safe fetching. Required: slug, id.

params.name: slug
params.description: URL slug (e.g. 'Alien-Blu-ray', 'Fight-Club-4K-Blu-ray'). Captured from sitemap or listing pages.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric release id (stable across slug renames).

tools.name: releases_new
tools.description: List recent Blu-ray, 4K, DVD, and digital releases (paginated). Returns release page links from the static template. Optional: show (default: newreleases), page (default: 1), country (plus 1 more).

params.name: show
params.description: Listing view: new releases or coming soon.

params.name: country
params.description: ISO 2-letter country filter (e.g. US, UK, FR).

tools.name: sitemap_bluraymovies
tools.description: One of nine gzipped Blu-ray release shards (50,000 URLs each). Pull all nine for the full Blu-ray catalog. Required: shard.

tools.name: sitemap_index
tools.description: Sitemap index — points at gzipped sub-sitemaps for main, news, bluraymovies (9 shards), dvdmovies (7), itunesmovies (5), digitalmovies (2), cast (11), ma, games, other.

tools.name: sitemap_news
tools.description: Compressed news sitemap — each entry has title + publication_date inline (no per-story fetch needed for enumeration).
